description: Comprehensive markdown documentation template for software applications and systems with recursive subsections, covering the full software lifecycle

sections.title: Project Overview
sections.description: High-level introduction, purpose, and scope of the software system or application

subsections.title: System Description
subsections.description: Concise explanation of what the system or application does

sections.title: Technology Stack
sections.description: Languages, frameworks, libraries, and tools used

sections.title: Architecture Overview
sections.description: High-level system or software architecture diagram

sections.title: Quick Start
sections.description: Minimal steps to run or deploy the system quickly

sections.title: Documentation Guide
sections.description: Links to detailed documentation sections

sections.title: System Purpose
sections.description: Why the system exists and what problems it solves

sections.title: Scope
sections.description: Boundaries and limitations of the system or application

sections.title: Stakeholders
sections.description: Actors, roles, and responsibilities interacting with the system

sections.title: Use Cases
sections.description: Typical scenarios demonstrating system usage

sections.title: Prerequisites
sections.description: Required software, environment, or dependencies

sections.title: Installation Steps
sections.description: Step-by-step installation instructions

subsections.title: Local Setup
subsections.description: How to install and run locally

subsections.title: Cloud or Container Setup
subsections.description: Deploy in cloud or container environments

sections.title: Configuration
sections.description: Environment variables, config files, or settings

sections.title: Architecture Overview
sections.description: High-level system architecture and main modules

sections.title: Component Breakdown
sections.description: Details of each component, module, or service

sections.title: Data Flow
sections.description: How data moves through the system

sections.title: Design Principles
sections.description: Guidelines and best practices used in the system design

sections.title: Architectural Decisions
sections.description: Key design choices and trade-offs

sections.title: Design Patterns
sections.description: Patterns and reusable solutions applied

sections.title: Project Structure
sections.description: Directory layout and organization

sections.title: Modules and Components
sections.description: Breakdown of modules and their responsibilities

sections.title: Core Logic
sections.description: Implementation details for key components

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Common usage examples

sections.title: Advanced Usage
sections.description: Advanced scenarios and configurations

sections.title: API Overview
sections.description: General API description

sections.title: Endpoints
sections.description: List of endpoints with request/response examples
